creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to John Grafton from comment #5)

There were issues with avoiding NONE and there is now (as of Mon, 05 Dec 2022):

git: 9eb502a33761 - main - sendmail: revert to use use NONE

See:

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/dev-commits-src-main/2022-December/011323.html

for the above.

The system will no longer complain about use of NONE as deprecated.
